hypothesis: Incorporating an InfoNCE-style cross-representation contrastive objective during Phase 1 such that embeddings of SMILES, SELFIES, InChI, and IUPAC for the same molecule are explicitly pulled together will increase scaffold-split ROC-AUC on BBBP and HIV by at least 2.0 percentage points relative to the current masked-LM-only STR-Bamba426M pretraining.
